claimText: National Taiwan University guidance says it takes a positive and constructive view of AI tools, encourages teachers to adjust course planning and learning assessment, and says students should understand AI-tool limitations for future learning.
normalizedValue: NTU central teaching guidance encourages course and assessment adjustment around AI tools

citation.citationTitle: 臺大針對生成式 AI 工具之教學因應措施
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
